---
title: "ODM - The Missing Guide"
id: activity-odm-15
order: 105
summary: "A practical guide to the operation of OpenDroneMap provided through the closed Ilias course area."
source_url: "https://ilias.uni-marburg.de/ilias.php?ref_id=2830985&cmd=view&cmdClass=ilrepositorygui&cmdNode=z3&baseClass=ilRepositoryGUI"
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/activities-odm-15.md"
---
